event.name: Premier League — Ipswich Town vs Leicester City (Relegation Six-Pointer, March 2026)

context.pre_match_notes: Both teams in relegation zone. Ipswich 18th, Leicester 19th. 3 points separates 17th from 20th with 10 games remaining. Direct six-pointer — both teams with maximum survival motivation. Home advantage the deciding variable in even contest.

question: Predict match direction when both teams have equal relegation pressure.

verified_outcome.key_variable: home_advantage as tiebreaker — equal motivation means standard modifiers dominate
